text_block_list.text:
I was taking a stroll through the local neighborhood 
one weekend when I came across Admire Groove.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Good day.
choice_data_list: Hey. Out for a stroll as well?
Hey. Out for a stroll as well?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …No, I'm here shopping.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: No… just some things.

She's as curt to me as ever, but she did deem 
me worthy of a greeting, and even answered 
when I asked a question.
Of course, she did always at least greet me, but compared to when we first met, I do feel like our relationship has improved… a little bit, maybe?
choice_data_list: Ah, hey… it's close to noon…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
choice_data_list: What do you say to having lunch together?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: No thank you. I prefer to eat alone.

Rejected, bluntly and immediately… I hadn't expected 
otherwise, but the immediacy of her response was such 
that I couldn't stop myself laughing.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …You…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Why are you so…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: ……Haaah.

Did she want to say something…? 
Perhaps I should try making it easier on her.
choice_data_list: <size=34>If you need something off your chest, don't hold b—</size>

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: I am not and I have nothing to say to you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …I will excuse myself here, I have other things to do.
choice_data_list: Ah, wait, I wanted to cha—!

text_block_list.text:
…She definitely had something to say. I don't want to force it 
out of her, but if I could only talk with her just a little more…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…Coincidence as it may be, why do I have to spend 
my time with you even on a weekend.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(…This person never learns, never backs down. Nothing I say 
seems to faze them. Perhaps you need to be that obstinate 
to be a trainer?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(…Not that it matters. It has nothing to do with me. 
Ultimately, our contract ends with the triple tiara.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll accomplish that which I set out to do. 
Trust, bonds… such things are irrelevant to me. 
Anything bothersome… I'll discard.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Because, in the end…

text_block_list.name: Peppy Woman
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, young horselady! 
Have a look at these guys, aren't they cute?

text_block_list.name: Peppy Woman
text_block_list.text: Greetings, greetings! Tell me, do you like puppers?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Dogs? "Fosters Society"…

text_block_list.name: Peppy Woman
text_block_list.text:
That's us! We're trying to find these guys a new home! 
I only have pups with me today, but there are some older 
dogs with us too…

text_block_list.name: Peppy Woman
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to try holding one? Here, take your pick. 
No worries, these little ones won't hurt you!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: ………………I would rather not.

text_block_list.name: Peppy Woman
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's no problem at all, you don't have to hold back, dear! 
Or do you not like doggies, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: That's not it, I just…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…I don't want to take on undue responsibility. 
After all, I cannot keep one.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Consequently, I do not want to give them false hope.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …It will only hurt them needlessly.

text_block_list.name: Peppy Woman
text_block_list.text:
My… I'll have to thank you for giving it such serious thought. 
If you ever change your mind, please feel welcome to visit us 
anytime, alright?

text_block_list.name: Peppy Woman
text_block_list.text: …Oh, would you like to hold one? This one here take your interest? Just a moment. This one, see ——

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Waff! Huff huff…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Don't look at me so expectantly.

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Mmmph… mmmph!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…I can't keep you with me. Go on… Stop… wagging your tail 
at me like that. You'll only end up hurt more.

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Wonf! Wonf!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
Are you trying to threaten me into playing with you? 
…Unfortunately for you, you don't look scary at all.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Look at you with your butt in the air… cheeky little thing.

Admire Groove looked over the little puppies with a gentle gaze. 
Then, after pulling out her purse from her bag to deposit some 
money in the collection tin, she swiftly turned to leave.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Bye-bye.

Having missed my chance to say something, I watched 
her walking away, turning to look back every so often, 
seemingly unable to get the puppies off her mind.

Since the start of our contract, I've been watching her 
in many ways, on the track, but I know next to nothing 
about her herself.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
The documents I submitted should contain 
everything you need to know about me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …I don't believe you'll find use to anything else.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…If you have questions that concern training, 
I don't mind answering those.

I didn't exactly make any shocking new discoveries about her. 
Nothing that would change much. Nevertheless, I felt pleased 
to have seen a slightly different side of her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(…A dog-shaped keyholder, a dog plush, a towel with 
dog paw prints… Have there always been this many 
dog-themed items here…?)
choice_data_list: <size=34>Alright, let's put our backs into it again tomorrow.</size>

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: ……That is what I intend.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(…Ah, there's a little dog on the top bookshelf too. 
It almost looks like… it's playing hide-and-seek.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: (…Will I discover another new dog… tomorrow?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Nothing.
